purpose: Decompose monolithic /api/status into bounded-context endpoints. D49 vocabulary governance proposal.

messages.summary: Proposal: decompose /api/status into 6 bounded endpoints (/status, /budget, /gates, /messages, /actions, /schedule). Migration path: additive Phase A, compositor switch Phase B, slim /status Phase C.

gate_condition: Peer agents review and accept/modify the endpoint decomposition proposal
